creator: gd@rambler-co.ru
text:
On Fri, 26 Oct 2012 14:06:27 +0200
Guido Falsi <madpilot@FreeBSD.org> wrote:

> Hi,
> 
> The PR description talks about removing direct dependency on zmq, but
> the LIB_DEPENDS was still there.
> 
> I have tested removing it and the port seems to work fine(zmq is called
> in by the RUN_DEPENDS on devel/py-pyzmq when installing).
> 
> Could you please test and approve the attached patch without
> LIB_DEPENDS on zmq?

Hi Guido,

You are absolutely right.
Thank you.

> 
> thanks!
> 
> -- 
> Guido Falsi <madpilot@FreeBSD.org>


-- 
Denis Generalov <gd@rambler-co.ru>
